decision3_substring: V_Sply is always in the range [10, 14]
output_structured_natural_language: whenever V_Sply_greaterThanOrEqual_10 & V_Sply_lessThanOrEqual_14, always satisfy V_Sply_greaterThanOrEqual_10 & V_Sply_lessThanOrEqual_14
